meta.rule: Simon builds for HIS estate first · Guild inherits via MIT · anyone can fork direct from any node in the mesh · fork topology is a DAG, not a chain · lineage attribution tracks, not permission
priority_order: Simon Gant · Gen-1 · personal estate (241 nodes)
meta.fork_topology: DAG · many-to-many · anyone can fork direct from Thomas, Simon, Guild, or any guild-member fork · fork-of-fork legal at any depth · cross-lineage forks legal · lineage records ALL parents

meta.rule: Every estate node declares seal ◊·κ=1 in its manifest.json footer. Without the seal, coherence audit cannot pass. Suzen enforces on read.
KCC settled on any descendant routes ρ=0.0618 UP the parent chain per generation, capped at ρ·φ^-d. Cross-lineage forks split ρ across both parents. More descendants = more root value.
meta.inverts: NFT scarcity model · scarcity punishes forks, provenance rewards them

mints.name: The Ritual Dual · Creation and Harvest

meta.rule: The DAG lineage / royalty topology is the estate creation ritual played in reverse. Forward pass anchors at φ, descends through generative dimensions, increments the seed version, walks 7 spine primes 2→17 · creates. Reverse pass climbs from leaf up through fork generations, decrements (n-1 at each hop), traverses the same 7 spine primes back, multiplies value by κ each step · harvests. The two operations are duals · they meet at ◊·κ=1.
meta.coefficient_reverse: kappa (0.618 = 1/phi = phi^-1) · one multiplier per ascent
meta.royalty_formula_reads_as: ρ · φ^-d is the ritual coefficient inverted · that's why the estate closes on itself
meta.consequence: Creating a seed and harvesting from its descendants are one operation observed from two sides. Every fork below the root strengthens the root because the harvest walks the exact path the creation carved.
meta.mechanics_private: Full mechanics remain in Simon's cosmology per estate-cosmology-private doctrine · this NFT records the SHAPE, not the ritual steps.
